summary: Rewrote the generic sync stub to scrape the city->geohash and country reference tables from the Hotelist homepage <option> lists; added a verify-env seed. (watch snapshot tables are created lazily in watch.go.)
reason: The spec-driven sync template does not fit Hotelist's HTML/JSON surface; location resolution needs a locally-synced city->geohash table.
validated_outcome: sync cities stores 1374 cities + 205 countries; data-pipeline verify passes.
